message:
fix(providers): add snapshot non-extension warnings in OpenAI Responses and map FUNCTION_CALL in Vertex

openai_responses.rs:
- Adds tracing::warn! calls when an incoming text or thinking snapshot
  from the SSE stream does not extend the previously accumulated
  content. Previously, these non-monotonic replacements happened
  silently, making it difficult to diagnose data-loss scenarios where
  the API sends a shorter snapshot that overwrites longer accumulated
  text. The warnings include content_index, old_len, and new_len fields
  for structured log filtering.

vertex.rs:
- Maps the "FUNCTION_CALL" finish_reason from the Vertex AI Gemini API
  to StopReason::ToolUse. Previously, FUNCTION_CALL fell through to the
  catch-all StopReason::Stop, which incorrectly signaled that the model
  finished generating rather than requesting a tool invocation. This
  caused tool-use flows to silently drop the tool call and treat the
  response as complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
